evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Build automated checks for data reliability, and monitor drift of reporting figures.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD is saturated with rigour signals (accuracy, reliability, automated checks, SEC reporting, documentation) with no velocity/speed language present.
evidence.domain_risk: Work with the US Hims & Hers financial team, to provide accurate, reliable and well documented data for SEC reporting.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: SEC reporting is explicit regulatory/financial reporting language tied to a public company, placing this at the highest domain risk tier.
evidence.collaboration_width: engineering; operations; finance; commercial; marketing teams; US Hims & Hers financial team
evidence.data_team_maturity: Standardise reporting across each region (UK, EU, AU, JP, CA).
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools (Netsuite, BigQuery, dbt) appear directly in responsibilities and multi-region standardisation implies an established, scaling reporting function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Accurately model our product COGs and services costs, with our revenue data to build payback models to help inform capital allocation decisions
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Highly specific financial and technical detail (COGs, payback models, Netsuite, BigQuery, SEC reporting) gives a precise picture of daily work.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Work with the US Hims & Hers financial team, to provide accurate, reliable and well documented data for SEC reporting.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: SEC reporting, financial concepts (CAC, LTV, Payback), and the finance team are the dominant framing throughout responsibilities.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The responsibilities section is explicitly framed as ownership ("What You'll Own") across revenue, SEC reporting, and payback models.
evidence.ai_role: We use AI-assisted tools across our business to help our teams work more efficiently, including within our recruitment process.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The only AI mention describes company-wide tool usage in general and recruitment, not a skill or responsibility expected of the candidate in this role.
evidence.testing_framing: Build automated checks for missing or duplicated data, schema drift, and anomalies
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and validation checks are named as an owned responsibility area with explicit ownership verbs, not just tools in a skill list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Investigate discrepancies between source data and reported figures.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: SEC reporting accuracy and financial data integrity dominate the JD, reflecting fear of bad data reaching regulators or financial stakeholders.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Maintain and improve the accuracy and reliability of our core orders, revenue & refunds models.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verbs are maintain/improve/standardise across existing revenue and reporting models rather than building new greenfield infrastructure.
evidence.work_arrangement: I am open to working in a hybrid setup (i.e. 3 days office, 2 days remote).
evidence.loss_aversion: Work with the US Hims & Hers financial team, to provide accurate, reliable and well documented data for SEC reporting. — reflects fear of inaccurate data reaching regulators or public financial reporting.
